channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Report: Minnesota Lottery needs to tighten up how it regulates retailers
item.description: Minnesota’s Office of the Legislative Auditor reports that the Minnesota State Lottery generally complies with requirements but has room to improve when it comes to how it manages retailers.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst, MPR News

item.title: Fox News Politics: Opening the flood Gaetz
item.description: The Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republicans rally around Hegseth, Trump's Pentagon pick, as Gaetz withdraws for attorney general
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s allies on Capitol Hill are rallying around Pete Hegseth, Trump’s Pentagon pick.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick, Stephen Groves And Kevin Freking, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Several of Trump's Cabinet picks — and Trump himself — have been accused of sexual misconduct
item.description: Former congressman Matt Gaetz has withdrawn his name as President-elect Donald Trump's choice for attorney general in the face of sexual misconduct allegations.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Would the US win a war with China over Taiwan? US lawmakers briefed on the potential outcome
item.description: House lawmakers were briefed Wednesday about the potential outcome of a U.S.-China war over Taiwan within the next two years, as the global superpower increasingly encroaches on U.S. allies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's incoming White House chief of staff's lobbying comes under scrutiny
item.description: Incoming White House chief of staff Susie Wiles has been called out by progressives for her past work as a lobbyist on behalf of various corporate special interests.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florist gets death threats after refusing to serve Trump voters
item.description: The owner posted on social media that the business is now temporarily closed after receiving several death threats. She also made all of her social media accounts private.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Knox, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk's DOGE commission considering mobile tax filing app: Report
item.description: The new DOGE commission is considering developing a free mobile app for tax filing, according to The Washington Post.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Here are the people Trump has picked for key positions so far
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is filling key posts in his second administration, and it's shaping up much differently than his first. He's prioritizing loyalists for top jobs. Trump was bruised and hampered by internal squabbles during his initial term in office.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Speaker Johnson declares support for banning Sarah McBride's access to women's restrooms
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — House Speaker Mike Johnson declared Wednesday that lawmakers and staff will have to use the restroom corresponding with their biological sex, a statement directed at Sarah McBride, the first transgender person to be elected to Congress, months before she is set to arrive on Capitol
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump names ambassador to NATO
item.description: President-elect Trump has named his former acting attorney general, Matthew Whitaker, as the next ambassador to NATO, selecting him to fill the role at a crucial time amid Russia's war in Ukraine and tensions over defense spending across the Western security alliance.
item.dc:creator: Brad Dress, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hennepin County commissioners delay vote on proposal to reduce jail population
item.description: The state’s Department of Corrections ordered Hennepin County to reduce the number of inmates at some of its jails by Dec. 5.
item.dc:creator: Peter Cox, MPR News

item.title: Gaetz meets with Senate Republicans as House ethics panel considers releasing report
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz, Trump's nominee to serve as Attorney General, faces an uphill battle as the House ethics panel considers releasing report on allegations involving sex with a minor.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh, MPR News

item.title: House Ethics Committee is deadlocked on whether to release Gaetz report
item.description: The U.S. House Committee on Ethics is deadlocked on whether to release its report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz, whose nomination to serve as Trump’s attorney general has been plagued by controversy.
item.dc:creator: Deirdre Walsh and Lexie Schapitl, MPR News

item.title: Trump's immigration grand strategy casts wide net
item.description: President-elect Trump is returning to the White House looking to dwarf his first term's significant impact on immigration policy.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Wrangling over whether to punt government funding to Trump heats up
item.description: The debate among Republicans over whether to punt government funding into the new year is heating up, as lawmakers race toward their next shutdown deadline. Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) this week said lawmakers are running out of time until the Dec.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada attorney general pledges to combat 'unconstitutional mandates' amid Trump election
item.description: Democratic Nevada Attorney General Aaron Ford said his office was prepared to address any “fear and uncertainty” following the election of President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Vance will introduce Gaetz, Hegseth to senators this week
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance will make the rounds with GOP senators later this week to introduce them to former-Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) and Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump’s picks to head the Justice and Defense departments.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: A GOP lawmaker introduces a Capitol bathroom rule before her trans colleague arrives
item.description: South Carolina Rep. Nancy Mace says the resolution aims to protect women's rights. Democratic Rep.-elect Sarah McBride, the first out trans person elected to Congress, has slammed it as a distraction.
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore and Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Speaker Johnson becomes 'MAGA' Mike, cementing place in Trump's circle
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is cementing his place in President-elect Trump’s inner orbit, becoming not only a visible — if slightly out-of-place-looking — part of his entourage, but a key supporter of his no-holds-barred approach to his second term.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9

item.title: Appeals court allows Indiana gender-affirming care ban to remain in effect
item.description: Indiana’s Republican Gov. Eric Holcomb signed the law, Senate Bill 480, last spring, one day after he called the measure “clear as mud.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, Fox 5

item.title: Florida GOP chair approves Gaetz AG nomination; state democratic chair concerned
item.description: There are increasing questions from political figures surrounding President-elect Donald Trump’s pick to lead the Justice Department. However, former Rep. Matt Gaetz is getting support from Evan Power, the chair of the Florida GOP.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC
